calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify An Irrevocable Trust By Consent Of All Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cynthia Lee for Pui Huey (Petitioner).

Ms. Lee explained circumstances regarding two of the Daughter's marital status problems, that the settlors recognized it and are concerned, stated that there is a history of modifying the Trust, and that the Mother wants to leave the house to the one Daughter that is happily married and that this Daughter can take care of the two Sisters. Ms. Lee also stated that Lily has always been a beneficiary, that the Mother wants to make sure the house is going to be protected, and made reference to the declaration of Nancy and Linda showing that they are fully in support of it. The Petition to Modify an Irrevocable Trust, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Modify An Irrevocable Trust By Consent Of All Beneficiaries
